inputs.name: seq_lens
inputs.meaning: Lengths of each sequence in the batch, indicating how many tokens are actually present in each example.
inputs.inference_role: Used to determine the current length of sequences to correctly align eviction of unused tokens.

inputs.name: evict_mask
inputs.meaning: A boolean mask indicating which draft tokens can be evicted from the memory cache.
inputs.inference_role: Used to track which tokens should be retained vs. which can be freed, helping manage memory efficiently during inference.

inputs.name: page_size
inputs.meaning: The size of memory pages which helps in aligning eviction of tokens to optimize memory operations.
inputs.inference_role: Defines the granularity of token eviction from memory, ensuring alignment with the memory architecture.

inputs.name: num_draft_tokens
inputs.meaning: The number of draft tokens generated in the current sequence processing.
inputs.inference_role: Helps determine the operating range for the eviction process, ensuring operations don't exceed available draft tokens.

inputs.name: BLOCK_SIZE
inputs.meaning: The size of the block used for processing parallel computations in Triton.
inputs.inference_role: Sets the processing block size to ensure efficient execution in parallel within the kernel.

outputs.name: evict_mask
outputs.meaning: Updated eviction mask reflecting which tokens have been marked for eviction post alignment.
outputs.inference_role: Used to inform the garbage collection of tokens in the memory, thereby improving memory utilization during model inference.
